title: Ginger Ray Glitter Let The Party Be Gin Bunting Backdrop Banner Party Decorations - 1.5 Metre - Jolly Vibes
features: Eye-catching "Let The Party Be Gin" bunting
Perfect for parties and any special celebrations!
Each pack contains 1 x 1.5m length bunting
Part of the Jolly Vibes range at Ginger Ray
description: From the manufacturer About Us Since our founder Ben started the Ginger Ray story in 2012, after finding there was a gap in the market for premium, innovative designs for celebrations, we’ve gone on to supply our designs worldwide, helping our customers to create memorable occasions. We’re all about making those occasions memorable. The Ginger Ray team are in party decorations, and our in-house design team are at the heart of everything we do. Everything is lovingly designed in-house at our offices in Surrey, England. Everything we make follows our core values: Create, Design, Innovate.
